title: prevostea glabra
intro: Prevostea glabra is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae, commonly known as a type of citrus plant. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, colds, and respiratory issues, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Prevostea glabra include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate coughs and sore throats, and boost the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used to make a tea or a syrup for its medicinal properties.
